note: Real high-frequency SportVU tracking for the nba-rl-sim demo possessions, re-derived from the raw .7z logs with the project's own dedup + half-court basket-relative transform (02_segment_possessions.normalize_to_half_court) and segmentation. players[] are 10 entities in NETWORK order [BH, tm1..4, def1..5], [x,y] in the env half-court frame (x in [0,47], basket at (5.25,25); y in [0,50]) — same frame as possessions.json snapshots. ball is [x,y,z] (z for shot-arc rendering). decision_snap_indices maps each recorded decision point to its nearest tracking frame (parity-exact snap). t is wall-time offset (s) from span start; span runs ~1s before the first decision frame to ~1.5s after the last to catch the shot/pass outcome flight.
court_frame: half-court basket-relative; x in [0,47] basket (5.25,25); y in [0,50]
